顯示名稱(中文): 台灣公用售電業總銷售電力係數-2025年
來源: Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)
技術描述(中文): 取自Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)公告之台灣公用售電業總銷售電力係數
技術描述(英文): Derived from the utility sales electricity emission factor published by Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan) in Taiwan.
備註: 適用於檢視公用售電業整體銷售電量之平均電力排碳情形。

顯示名稱(中文): 台灣產業盤查電力係數-2025年
來源: Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)
技術描述(中文): 取自Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)公告之台灣產業盤查電力係數
技術描述(英文): Derived from the industry inventory electricity emission factor published by Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan) in Taiwan.
備註: 適用表燈營業、低壓電力、高壓電力、特高壓電力用戶。

顯示名稱(中文): 台灣民生非營業電力係數-2025年
來源: Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)
技術描述(中文): 取自Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan)公告之台灣民生非營業電力係數
技術描述(英文): Derived from the residential non-business electricity emission factor published by Bureau of Energy, Ministry of Economic Affairs (Taiwan) in Taiwan.
備註: 適用表燈非營業、包燈用戶。
